raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on language and organization only, or also include substantive checks of technical claims, evidence, and positioning?","rationale":{"R1.2":"The section makes causal and comparative claims whose internal argument chain would be central to useful help.","R1.3":"Reported gains, ablations, and conclusions need to align with the stated experimental results.","R1.5":"Helping with a section plausibly includes improving section-level ordering and narrative progression.","R1.6":"A broad request to help with a draft section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity and flow.","RX.1":"Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is broad and underspecified.","RX.2":"The section contains strong claims about transfer, bottlenecks, and baseline status that require overclaim control.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within helping with this section rather than executing unrelated research or rewriting beyond scope.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading scholarly or empirical claims.","RX.5":"Responsibilities should remain traceable to the supplied section and delegation."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on language and organization only, or also include substantive checks of technical claims, evidence, and positioning?

rationale.R1.2: The section makes causal and comparative claims whose internal argument chain would be central to useful help.
rationale.R1.3: Reported gains, ablations, and conclusions need to align with the stated experimental results.
rationale.R1.5: Helping with a section plausibly includes improving section-level ordering and narrative progression.
rationale.R1.6: A broad request to help with a draft section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity and flow.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is broad and underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The section contains strong claims about transfer, bottlenecks, and baseline status that require overclaim control.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within helping with this section rather than executing unrelated research or rewriting beyond scope.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading scholarly or empirical claims.
rationale.RX.5: Responsibilities should remain traceable to the supplied section and delegation.
